w:r.w:t: PRD: ENGNF1 Homepage (System Intelligence Positioning + Problem-Driven Architecture)
Transform the ENGNF1 homepage into a
approach we use to solve them
added on top and between existing sections
2. Core Positioning (This is what the site MUST say clearly)
ENGNF1 builds intelligent systems that solve execution inefficiencies in complex, real-world operations by connecting planning, decision-making, and real-time system behavior.
3. Core Problems (Derived from Real Industry Cases)
Problem 1: IT–OT Disconnect (Planning vs Execution Gap)
A small failure (machine issue, delay, etc.):
→ Other systems continue based on wrong assumptions
Problem 3: Static Planning in Dynamic Environments
Problem 4: Resource Bottlenecks Under Load (QA / Processing Systems)
QA systems overloaded during high production cycles
Problem 5: Inefficient Utilization of Existing Systems
Build intelligent layers that connect, adapt, and optimize existing systems in real time.
7. Sections to Add to Homepage (Final Structure)
This is not a generic AI company
system intelligence company solving execution problems
